agent_hint: Create a new task. Required: title. Optional: description, priority (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/URGENT), assignee, due_date. Auto-generated: code (TASK-yyyyMMdd-seq), status (NEW).
precondition_description: No preconditions — any authenticated user with GP.task.manage permission can create a task.
output_description: Returns the created task record with auto-generated code and initial status NEW.

example_input.gp_task_description: Build the login page with email/password authentication

agent_hint: Update an existing task. Editable fields: title, description, priority, assignee, due_date. Status is NOT editable here — use state transition commands instead.
precondition_description: Task must exist; status field is not included in inputFields and cannot be changed via this command.
output_description: Returns the updated task record with all modified fields.

agent_hint: Transition task status from NEW to in_progress. Indicates work has begun on this task. No additional input fields required.
precondition_description: Task must be in NEW status.
output_description: Returns the updated task record with status set to in_progress.

agent_hint: Transition task status from in_progress to DONE. Automatically creates a completion comment on the task via sideEffect. Use only when the task work is fully finished.
precondition_description: Task must be in in_progress status.
side_effect_description: Creates a gp_task_comment record with content 'Task completed.' linked to the completed task.
output_description: Returns the updated task record with status set to DONE.

extension.confirmMessage:zh-CN: 确认归档此任务？归档后不可恢复。
extension.confirmMessage:en: Confirm archive this task? This cannot be undone.

agent_hint: Transition task status from DONE to archived. This is a terminal state — archived tasks cannot be reopened. Requires user confirmation.
precondition_description: Task must be in DONE status.
output_description: Returns the updated task record with terminal status archived.

extension.confirmMessage:zh-CN: 确认删除此任务？此操作不可撤销。
extension.confirmMessage:en: Confirm delete this task? This action is irreversible.

agent_hint: Delete a task permanently. Irreversible operation. Precondition: task status must be NEW — tasks that are in progress, done, or archived cannot be deleted.
precondition_description: Task must be in NEW status; tasks in in_progress, DONE, or archived cannot be deleted.
output_description: Returns confirmation of deletion; the task record is permanently removed.

agent_hint: Retrieve a single task record by ID. Returns all fields including status, priority, assignee, and due date.
precondition_description: Task with the specified ID must exist.
output_description: Returns the full task record including all fields.

agent_hint: Query task records with pagination and filtering. Supports filters by status, priority, assignee. Supports keyword search on title and code.
precondition_description: No preconditions — returns empty list if no tasks match.
output_description: Returns a paginated list of task records matching the specified filters.
